title: Decopot Hanging Faux Plant & Stone Look Planter
description: This artificial plant not only has the beautiful appearance of a real plant, but also lasts longer. Will never die and is easy to care for with no need for watering. Realistic in colour and texture, it brings the lush beauty of the outdoors to your home. Its charming stone look geometric pot makes it very on trend. Put it in front of a window, or in the corner of a room to add texture, warmth and visual interest to your decor. Neat, hassle free and looks fresh all the time
